title: Activities should follow the item accross new boards when forwarded
excerpt: Improvement request: Currently, when an item is moved from one board to another, the activity history does not follow the item to the new board. We must imperatively return to the previous board to consult the overall ac…

posts.author: Logan_INSIDE (Logan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Improvement request: Currently, when an item is moved from one board to another, the activity history does not follow the item to the new board. We must imperatively return to the previous board to consult the overall activity history of that board. This process is not smooth and does not allow for complete tracing of the item.

Would it be possible to ensure that the complete activity log follows the item across all the boards it will traverse during the life of the item?

posts.author: JulianWollmann (Julian Wollmann)
posts.cookedHtml: Would really love this feature - currently we have to temperarily move it back to the original board to recover the activity log.
